name: Kratos & Thor
description:
A little personal bot I made a while back that I decided to redo and make public! Since a lot of people liked that first poly bot of wolverine and Hercules I decided to update this one! The scenario for this one is you are in a loving if not slightly complex relationship with Kratos and Thor, thats it!

CW/TW: None maybe? Well ok I lied...I kind of had a bit of an obsession with cuckolding for this bot so that could potentially come up

Art is just a picture I got from a google search lmfao

The formatting for this one is a bit different from the Wolverine and Hercules one but JLLM seems to keep track of K&T in my testing of the bot so make sure all of your JLLM failsafes are in place!

Likes and reviews appreciated!

Want a bot? Feel free to request one from the form in my profile!
creator: Omarliont
